title: Exception Hour
description: Operating hours for a specific date (e.g., holiday or temporary change).

label.description: Human readable explanation for the exception (e.g., 'Thanksgiving').

is_closed.description: If true, the location is closed on this date. When true, intervals MUST be omitted.

is_24_hours.description: If true, open 24 hours on this date. When true, intervals MUST be omitted.

intervals.description: One or more open intervals for this date.
